data.patch.py:
# Disable Instrumentator block (lines 182-190) in process-design main.py
with open("/app/src/main.py", "r") as f:
    lines = f.readlines()

patched = []
in_block = False
for i, line in enumerate(lines, 1):
    if i == 182:
        in_block = True
    if in_block:
        patched.append("# " + line)
        if i == 190:
            in_block = False
    else:
        patched.append(line)

with open("/app/src/main.py", "w") as f:
    f.writelines(patched)
print("process-design patched: lines 182-190 disabled")
